text:
Created attachment 187748
pdfstitch v0.5 -> v0.6 diff

Hello,

I would like to update print/pdfstitch from v0.5 to v0.6.

Port changes:
  - None (only version update)

Sofware changes:
  - Fixes an issue where "--defaultcrop" could not be combined with other parameters.

SVN diff attached.

Thanks & Best Regards,
Stefan
